userProfile.title: User Profile
userProfile.description: Information about the user that Sitara can remember, including name, nickname, and custom preferences

creatorName.description: The name of the user/creator, typically Abhimanyu

assistantName.description: The name of his AI companion, typically Sitara

preferences.description: Custom preferences and memories that Sitara has saved about Abhimanyu

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated

chatMessage.title: Chat Message
chatMessage.description: A single chat message between the user and Sitara

timestamp.description: Time when the message was sent

/profiles/{uid}/messages/{messageId}.description: Chat messages between the user and Sitara
